subject: Re: Customs delay JFK
body:
but did customs understand that we weren't pre
cleared..... the inspector that came to the plane
said,,something..... WHat do you think is the right
price for strolls 430...they offered it to me at 3.35o

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

> Jeffrey,
> I called Customs JFK after your arrival, Inspector
> Perez had now explanation 
> for the delay you experienced, she confirmed the
> following:
> -Bill faxed JFK customs the arrival report Sunday
> 5:00pm
> -He called JFK before departure from St. Thomas
> -Called 1 hour before arrival to confirm via Sat
> phone.
> I believe phone edict plays to our advantage when 
> dealing with Customs, as 
> you have seen in the past.
> 
> I complete Gulfsteam school Friday at 1:00pm, I will
> come to NY if departure 
> is scheduled for Saturday.
> 
> Larry V.
> 11/28/05
> 10:25pm
>

body_html:
but did customs understand that we weren't pre
cleared..... the inspector that came to the plane
said,,something..... WHat do you think is the right
price for strolls 430...they offered it to me at 3.35o

--- LVJET@aol.com wrote:

Jeffrey,
I called Customs JFK after your arrival, Inspector
Perez had now explanation
for the delay you experienced, she confirmed the
following:
-Bill faxed JFK customs the arrival report Sunday
5:00pm
-He called JFK before departure from St. Thomas
-Called 1 hour before arrival to confirm via Sat
phone.
I believe phone edict plays to our advantage when
dealing with Customs, as
you have seen in the past.

I complete Gulfsteam school Friday at 1:00pm, I will
come to NY if departure
is scheduled for Saturday.

Larry V.
11/28/05
10:25pm
